underlying_goal: Set up automated version tagging from git in an Android project, establish best practices for release workflows, and clean up redundant dev pre-release infrastructure
friction_detail: README edits were made in main worktree but uncommitted, causing a merge conflict when user tried to pull on main.
brief_summary: User wanted to automate Android app versioning from git tags and establish release best practices; Claude implemented auto-versioning, cleaned up dev releases, updated docs, and guided the user through verified tag/release nuances.
